6,75.title: Seekers Keep
6,75.description:
Free books and maps.
Can kill owner for a rare helm drop and possible artifacts like 7 league boots.

Hard fight, uses cold spells, bring blankets.

*Map seller
All are free on vendor but 360 day reset.
No influence reset.

55,45.title: Palmia
55,45.description:
Skills:
Carpentry, Blacksmith, Alchemy, Sculpture, Jewelery, Weaving, Crafting, Cooking

Casino is through 2 teleporters toward the bottom of the map.
*Rooms have stealable 30 slot containers and panty(that respawn).
*Walls can be mined for Rubynus(extremely valuable).

Notable prize options: Ether antibodies, Ehekatl pillow prize(recipes when sleeping)
*Basketball and slots are skillbased
*Blackjack is fair now
Rare Platinum coin merchant
20x+ luck items for 100 platinum coins each(key item).

*Good choice for music quests.
*King bad available here.
*Aging shelf.

Altar of earth present.

17,50.title: The Cursed Manor
17,50.description:
Short quest
Backer unlock (can still visit)

5,54.title: Port Kapul
5,54.description:
Skills:
Throwing, Lightarmor, Heavyarmor, Shield, Twohanded, Strategy, Evasion

Blackmarket merchant (Good for investing)
Drug dealer (has hormone potions and more)
Junk Vendor

Fighter's Guild member only:
Dual wield, Eye of Mind, Tactics

Month 6: Festival of the dead/Halloween

53,60.title: Truce Grounds
53,60.description:
Altars of all normal gods(no fox gods, yevan, yaksha just the "7 Pillars")
*Generator to steal if you can carry it.
*The altars here are fixed in faith and cannot be taken over.

5,49.title: Quiet Beach
5,49.description:
Source of rare white sand also available by digging up lines in places like Little Garden example.
*Karma for taking

28,46.title: Vernis
28,46.description: Following the story leads you here and gives you a dungeon and much more land to work with. (gated behind a boss fight)

23,42.title: Aquli Teola
23,42.description:
(Cyberdome) City of Mani

Gacha Machine (Blue)
Cyber Altar of Mani of Machine
Gunsmith
*Can mine pillars for 3 steel ore
*Early gun and bullet recipe

45,37.title: Yowyn
45,37.description:
Skills:
Mining, Lumberjacking, Digging, Taming, Fishing, Gathering, Farming

Best gathering quest selection.

16,34.title: Derphy
16,34.description:
The town of Thieves
Slavery Merchant
Blackmarket merchant
*No guards (safe if -100 karma)

Skills:
Spot Hidden, Lockpicking, Disarm Trap, Magic Device
Thieves Guild: Member only(enter under the bar or from corpse pool)
Gun, Marksman, Greater Evasion, Pickpocket

*Walls and vaults are valuable to steal from.
*Vending machine for lockpicks.
*Pachislot machine

13,26.title: Little Garden
13,26.description:
*Second cooler box.
Little sister quest and merchants related to mechanical ball capture.
Body pillow of all gods but Ehekatl.

35,27.title: Tinker's camp
35,27.description:
Skills:
Stealth, Swim, Weightlifting, Riding, Symbiosis, Music, Literacy, Appraise, Anatomy, Regeneration

*City Policy Vendor
*Valuable bed (Hammock) for 2 tickets, one of the easiest and best bed you can get, also very light.

30,24.title: Puppy's cave
30,24.description:
Your first real quest.
Craft an armor a weapon and fill all slots.
If you are dying in one hit to anything but mercenaries, it's a skill issue (or you picked fairy/snail)

38,22.title: Beach
38,22.description:
Important early
Get big leaves and needles here for those tight ropes.
Good idea to grow some of the trees for later.

51,13.title: Mysilia
51,13.description:
Skills:
Martial art, Long Sword, Axe, Staff, Baw, Polearm, Shortsword, Scyte, Mace

*2 furniture ticket for mic in the church.
*3 furniture ticket for tax box in the bank.
*Witch sells food with rare effects(good and bad, gourmet is useful here).

50,11.title: Merchants Guild
50,11.description:
Member only skills:
Investing, Negotiation, Travelling

Join the guild with quest to buy and handout 30 fliers
*Can deconstruct fliers for easy textiles

34,9.title: Olvina
34,9.description:
City of Spas

Moonsong Festival 3rd month for minor goddess Odina

Skills:
Carpentry, Blacksmith, Alchemy, Sculpture, Jewelery, Weaving, Crafting, Cooking

Wooden figure merchant (quest request item)
*Plant pot gacha(silver coins)
*Cooker

46,3.title: Willow
46,3.description:
Skills:
Investing, Meditation, Casting, Faith

*Easel
*Harp
*Princes bed
*Wheel of pain (generator)

61,83.title: Somewhere
61,83.description:
Not online, not random base

Nearly every crafting and processing bench is in this location.
It's a duplicate of the starting meadow.
Several precious items a scattered around, although they cannot be picked up.
There are furnitures, junk, and Plant Pot gacha machines here.
It has several floors above and below.

60,76.title: Nefu Village
60,76.description:
Only place to worship Horome of Moonshadow(foxmaid god) (headpat special ability)
*Fox milk for sale.

64,61.title: Specwing
64,61.description:
The Inn of the Mighty Tree
Souvenir Shopkeeper

Ration Maker
Drying Rack
Quest Board
Lute

92,55.title: Noyel
92,55.description:
Skills:
Stealth, Swimming, Weighlifting, Riding, Symbiosis, Music, Literacy, Appraise, Anatomy, Regeneration

*Holy Well (gives clear water)
*12th month festival Jure holiday

Furnitures:
Holy Well, Grand Cross of Goddness, Aging Shelf, Fridge

90,44.title: Miral and Garokk's Workshop
90,44.description:
Small Medal vendor
Monster balls lvl. 20/40
Many useful upgrades for storage and beds
Tent electricity upgrade
High quality gear and weapons

*4x Snowman generators

76,38.title: The Graveyard
76,38.description:
Free panties, throwing weapon and instrument
High value

63,37.title: Lumiest
63,37.description:
Skills:
Investing, Meditation, Casting, Faith
Mage Guild only:
Magic Control, Magic Capacity, Memorisation

*City vendor
*Good pianist quest selection. (Palmia as well)
*Mage Guild approval letter sold here for 1.9k.
*Aging shelf (for cheese)
*Mirror Table

70,25.title: Mifu Village
70,25.description:
(Fox people)
Seeds:
Rice, Potato, corn, Carrots, Cabbage

Only place to worship Kizuami of Trickery
Special ability: bypass resists with debuffs

*Wheel of pain (generator)
Calligraphy Kit at the furniture store (spellbooks can be bound to melee weapons)

77,6.title: The Place Where Winds Rest
77,6.description: Do not pray and uncurse all daggers unless you want to have a bad time.
